error.signature: RuntimeError: FlashAttention only supports Ampere GPUs or newer (sm >= 80)

verdict.summary: FlashAttention requires GPU compute capability >= 8.0 (Ampere: A100, RTX 3090+). Older GPUs are not supported.

dead_ends.action: Install an older version of flash-attn
dead_ends.why_fails: No version of flash-attn supports pre-Ampere GPUs; the hardware limitation is fundamental

dead_ends.action: Set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES to a different GPU hoping it works
dead_ends.why_fails: If no Ampere+ GPU is available on the machine, no device will work

workarounds.action: Use torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention with math backend as fallback
workarounds.how: with torch.backends.cuda.sdp_kernel(enable_flash=False, enable_math=True): output = F.scaled_dot_product_attention(q, k, v)

workarounds.action: Set attn_implementation='eager' when loading HuggingFace models
